tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 exit
class-map match-any ICMP-FROM-WKPTXS
 match access-group name ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
 exit
policy-map POLICE-ICMP
 class ICMP-FROM-WKPTXS
  police 16000 8000
  conform-action transmit
  exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
interface GigabitEthernet1/0
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
interface GigabitEthernet1/1
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
interface GigabitEthernet1/3
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
exit
end
write memory
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1
show running-config | section policy-map
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
